title: French Pine Madeleine Cake
description: A classic French dessert, Madeleine cake is a spongy, shell-shaped cake traditionally flavored with lemon zest and often paired with a light dusting of powdered sugar. In this recipe, we add the nutty flavor of pine nuts to create a unique twist on this timeless treat.
instructions: Butter and flour a 12-cup Madeleine mold.
Sift the flour and sugar into a medium bowl.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and vanilla extract.
Add the flour mixture to the egg mixture and whisk until just combined.
Fold in the pine nuts and heavy cream.
Pour the batter into the prepared mold and smooth the top.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool in the mold for 5 minutes.
Transfer the cake to a wire rack to cool completely.
Dust the cake with powdered sugar before serving.
